{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322032101BA24CA4FC0C13F7AF390"}"},"total":1934},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7564107026982863641","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"前期很好看，剧情足够精彩，轻松向爽文，主角隐世大能人设稳住了。可惜中后期小玄天界出来质量直线下滑，爽点越来越少，套路也没变。总体7.5分，可以试试"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1761163506,"group_id":"7265212475480476691","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nxmj+BBDhmuDuHglUhw6qnQg0wKsa+rsAhIl3IqeLIna","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/477c8a6c3a7e4176876451026decf0f1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776703473&x-signature=DDLrr5N08O9SwuJGnYog4CmeFMk%3D","user_id":"4172015412447400","user_name":"清玄大弟"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4172015412447400","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7265212475480476691","book_info":{"abstract":"【迪化+反差+扮猪吃虎+玄幻脑洞】
顾衡穿越二十年，垃圾系统误终生，修行无望，只能做个小小凡人。
虽然是凡人，但也要做好事。
他随手帮助了一位可怜少女，人家日后成了名震三界的“白雪剑仙”。
他捡到了一只伤重的小野猫，养了很久，最后突然发现，自己的宠物成了“万妖尊者”。
他指点几下炼药技巧，给一位年轻炼药师学去，不知不觉间造就了“万药圣手”。
他认了一位瘦小巴巴的女徒弟，最终无意间培养出了“问古大帝”。
顾衡：这些都跟我没关系的，我只是个凡人而已。
众人：别狡辩了，她们都说你才是天下唯一的帝圣尊师！！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/631de637622e654d08f48300228914af","author":"金属寒霜","author_id":"","book_id":"7265212475480476691","book_name":"我只是一个凡人，为什么你们都奉我为圣","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d83030","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":93,"name":"扮猪吃虎","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=93&name=扮猪吃虎&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":843,"name":"迪化","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=843&name=迪化&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7265361496522099748","read_count":"39099","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2357092"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.7","serial_count":"1186","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,扮猪吃虎,无敌,东方玄幻,迪化","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/af8208c0067f2aaf5481b721155902af~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779304861&x-signature=TdL5q9dFbsc9rquKn%2BnKNSSjuQA%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"793"},"
